name: Content Author
description: Author and editor dashboard for managing drafts, editing articles, and viewing published content. Functional workspace focused on writing productivity.

page_briefs.drafts: Data table listing draft articles with columns for title, status (draft/review/scheduled), last edited date, word count, and author. Sortable columns and quick-action buttons for edit and delete. New draft button prominent in the header.
page_briefs.editor: Full-width document editor with rich text formatting toolbar, inline image upload, and metadata sidebar (tags, category, excerpt, featured image). Auto-save indicator in the top bar. Preview and publish buttons in the header.
page_briefs.published: Data table of published articles with columns for title, publish date, views, category, and status. Row actions for unpublish, edit, and view live. Filter by date range and category.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area for authoring
